positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for pos.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for pos.tptp
1. german(heinrich_schmidt) [input(axiom)]
2. politician(heinrich_schmidt) [input(axiom)]
3. member_of(heinrich_schmidt,prussian) [input(axiom)]
4. member_of(heinrich_schmidt,nazi) [input(axiom)]
5. ? [X0] : (german(X0) & politician(X0) & member_of(X0,prussian) & member_of(X0,nazi)) [input(conjecture)]
6. ~? [X0] : (german(X0) & politician(X0) & member_of(X0,prussian) & member_of(X0,nazi)) [negated conjecture 5]
7. ! [X0] : (~german(X0) | ~politician(X0) | ~member_of(X0,prussian) | ~member_of(X0,nazi)) [ennf transformation 6]
8. german(heinrich_schmidt) [cnf transformation 1]
9. politician(heinrich_schmidt) [cnf transformation 2]
10. member_of(heinrich_schmidt,prussian) [cnf transformation 3]
11. member_of(heinrich_schmidt,nazi) [cnf transformation 4]
12. ~member_of(X0,nazi) | ~politician(X0) | ~member_of(X0,prussian) | ~german(X0) [cnf transformation 7]
13. ~politician(heinrich_schmidt) | ~member_of(heinrich_schmidt,prussian) | ~german(heinrich_schmidt) [resolution 11,12]
14. ~member_of(heinrich_schmidt,prussian) | ~german(heinrich_schmidt) [forward subsumption resolution 13,9]
15. ~german(heinrich_schmidt) [forward subsumption resolution 14,10]
16. $false [forward subsumption resolution 15,8]
% SZS output end Proof for pos.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation
